summary: This is not a traditional blog post but a brief notice announcing that Joel on Software is closed for the day in observance of World AIDS Day and Day Without Art/Weblogs on November 30, 2000. Joel links to three related initiatives and suspends his blog in solidarity. The post consists of only 17 words of original content plus three hyperlinks.
key_points: Joel participated in 'Day Without Weblogs,' a coordinated blogger protest/awareness campaign for World AIDS Day
The post demonstrates early blogger culture and collective action in the year 2000
Joel chose solidarity and silence over content creation as a form of awareness-raising
money_quotes: Joel on Software is closed for the day.
key_insight: Sometimes the most meaningful thing a writer can do is choose not to write.
